label: Work
classifier_hint: Describe, in one or two sentences, what belongs in this area. This text is fed verbatim to the triage model and is the single biggest lever on classification quality.

label: Personal
classifier_hint: Personal life and admin: family, household, health, finances, travel, appointments, errands.

label: Unsorted
classifier_hint: Use when the capture does not clearly belong to any other area, or is too ambiguous to place confidently. Never force a guess — route here instead.
